statement.headerDoc:
STEP 878 — n=911 Universal On-Ramp Partial ∀n Closure
  ======================================================

  Problem 011 (STEP 875) showed that each of the 25 canonical atomic cores
  has orbit visiting n=911 (Lean 4 zero-sorry, 47 theorems via `native_decide`).

  This file upgrades that to an *infinite* sub-family for which ∀n visits 911
  is Lean 4 zero-sorry:

    ∀ k : ℕ, orbit(2^k · 911) visits 911 in exactly k steps.

  This is the full Collatz-inverse tree restricted to the pure powers-of-two
  branch of 911. It does NOT address the arithmetic predecessors (e.g. 607)
  whose inver
